package.name: droid_w_ros2
package.description: ROS 2 wrapper for DROID-W (DROID-SLAM in the Wild). Subscribes a monocular image topic, buffers frames, runs the DROID-W batch SLAM, and republishes the estimated trajectory as nav_msgs/Odometry + tf and the sparse keyframe cloud as sensor_msgs/PointCloud2. A TUM-format trajectory file is saved on shutdown.
